success_criteria: Zero linting errors (ESLint); Prettier formatting compliant; Commit messages follow Conventional Commits; No hardcoded secrets detected (GitGuardian).
escalation_procedure: Developer remediates immediately; Tech Lead review for false positives.
business_impact: Prevents technical debt accumulation and credential leakage early in the lifecycle.

success_criteria: Global coverage > 80%; Financial/Payout Orchestration > 100%; Audit Log Service > 95%; Authentication > 95%.
escalation_procedure: Pull Request rejected automatically. Developer must add tests.
business_impact: Ensures logic integrity for critical financial and security components, reducing risk of financial loss.

success_criteria: Zero Critical or High vulnerabilities in npm packages and Docker images; SAST scan passes OWASP Top 10 checks.
escalation_procedure: Security Team review required for waivers on false positives. Critical CVEs require immediate patch.
business_impact: Prevents introduction of known vulnerabilities, protecting client data and ensuring compliance (SOC 2).

success_criteria: 100% pass rate for Stripe/Wise contract tests; Payout Saga patterns validate atomic rollback; Postgres pgvector queries execute successfully.
escalation_procedure: Notify Backend Lead. Rollback if detected in main branch.
business_impact: Validates that microservices and external payment gateways interact correctly, preventing transaction failures.

success_criteria: API Response p95 < 250ms; Vector Search < 500ms; SOW Processing throughput > 60s/doc; Bulk Import > 500 records/min.
escalation_procedure: Performance Engineer analysis. Optimization sprint required if degradation persists.
business_impact: Ensures system responsiveness and scalability for enterprise workloads, preventing SLA breaches.

success_criteria: 100% pass rate on Critical paths: 'Vendor Proposal Submission', 'Admin Payout Approval', 'Client Invoice Payment'.
escalation_procedure: QA Lead investigation. Manual regression test fallback if automation is flaky.
business_impact: Guarantees core business value streams function correctly from the user's perspective.

success_criteria: PII redaction verified in logs and SOW artifacts; Encryption at rest verified for RDS/S3; Data residency checks pass.
tools_used: AWS Macie, Custom PII Scripts, Manual Audit
escalation_procedure: Legal/Compliance review. Release halt until compliant.
business_impact: Ensures GDPR/CCPA compliance, avoiding legal penalties and reputational damage.

success_criteria: Health check endpoints return 200 OK; Error rate < 0.1%; Latency matches baseline; Database connection pool stable.
escalation_procedure: On-call Engineer paged. Incident response initiated.
business_impact: Minimizes downtime and user impact during failed deployments.
